name: BulkSubmitStatus
title: Bulk Submit Status
description: The bulk-submit-status operation sends a status request for a previous bulk-submit operation request.

parameter.name: submitter
parameter.documentation: The submitter must match a system and code specified by the Data Recipient (coordinated out-of-band or in an implementation guide specific to a use case).

parameter.name: submissionId
parameter.documentation: The value must be unique for the submitter.

parameter.name: _outputFormat
parameter.documentation: The format for the generated bulk data files used to return OperationOutcome resources related to the submission status and, when applicable, other resources. Currently, ndjson must be supported, though servers may choose to also support other output formats. Servers SHALL support the full content type of application/fhir+ndjson as well as abbreviated representations including application/ndjson and ndjson. Defaults to application/fhir+ndjson.
